title: May 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 30''' is the 150th day of the year (151st in leap years). There are 215 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Mike W. Barr]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Chris Reiff]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 66|''Star Wars Weekly'' 66]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 50|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 50]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 30|''Star Wars'' (1998) 30]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones (video game)|''Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones'' video game]] released.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Panel to Panel Volume 2: Expanding the Universe]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 2|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 2]] published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Knight Errant Volume 2: Deluge]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:iOS|iOS]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[The Rise of a Hero]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Lando - Double or Nothing 1|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 6]]'' published.
*2023 – [[John Beasley]] dies.
<noinclude>
